message:
test(core): proptest diagnostic redaction suite (650 lines)

Add comprehensive property-based test suite for the diagnostic
redaction subsystem covering:

- Serde roundtrips for all RedactionStats fields
- DiagnosticFieldPolicy invariants: default/strict/permissive key-set
  properties, always-redact and always-safe key behavior
- DiagnosticPrivacyBudget preset ordering and limit arithmetic
- RedactionStats total_redactions additive correctness
- DiagnosticRedactor determinism, truncation behavior, and budget
  consumption under randomized input
- RuntimeTelemetryEvent redaction integration with HealthTier and
  RuntimePhase variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
